jdbcService.sql: select * from ~cdm_instances ci join ~cdm_definitions cd on cd.id = ci.cdm_definition_id where ci.active = true and (:typeId is null or cd.type_id = :typeId) -- Skip an instance only when there is nothing left that can change the merged CDM state. and exists ( select 1 from ~cdm_instance_subscriptions cis join ~cdm_system_subscriptions css on css.id = cis.cdm_subscription_id join ~cdm_systems cs on cs.id = css.cdm_system_id where cis.cdm_instance_id = ci.id and cis.decoupled is null and ( -- Keep the instance if a non-skipped, non-triggerOnly subscription can still be pulled. not ( css.trigger_only = true or cs.name = any(:skipPullForSystem) ) or ( -- Also keep it if any subscription has pulled newer data than it has merged. cis.pulled is not null and ( cis.merged is null or cis.pulled > cis.merged ) ) ) )
